Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Excuse me, I hope I'm not interrupting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Based on our testing results, we've confirmed he has more than enough potential.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}So, I decided to call this meeting to introduce him to the rest of the squad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}W-Wait, Mr. Chairman, he's only in elementary school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}We've already confirmed he has the potential. With training, he should be a valuable asset to the team.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Did he say he was okay with this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Actually, it was my idea to join.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}And, I think I finally understand why I have this power.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}...As you can see, it was his own decision.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Looking forward to working with you. I'll try not to get in anyone's way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I look forward to working with you as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Thank you. I'm hoping to learn a lot, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Hey, don't worry, kid. We got your back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}It might get tough, but you gotta work hard and stick with it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yet another new ally has joined.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ken Amada... He seems very level-headed[n]for an elementary school student.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}As the team leader, I need[n]to give him proper support.[n]{f 1 1}
